properties.code: function createRenderer(){function rr(ctx,x,y,w,h,r){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x+r,y);ctx.lineTo(x+w-r,y);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y,x+w,y+r);ctx.lineTo(x+w,y+h-r);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y+h,x+w-r,y+h);ctx.lineTo(x+r,y+h);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y+h,x,y+h-r);ctx.lineTo(x,y+r);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y,x+r,y);ctx.closePath()}return{render(t,context){const ctx=context.mainContext,w=context.width,h=context.height;let g=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,w,h);g.addColorStop(0,'#030712');g.addColorStop(.48,'#071c2a');g.addColorStop(1,'#24142f');ctx.fillStyle=g;ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h);ctx.save();ctx.globalCompositeOperation='screen';for(let i=0;i<4;i++){const x=[240,780,1395,1695][i]+Math.sin(t*.35+i)*86,y=[210,750,330,840][i]+Math.cos(t*.4+i)*58;const rg=ctx.createRadialGradient(x,y,0,x,y,500);rg.addColorStop(0,['rgba(125,211,252,.34)','rgba(123,216,143,.24)','rgba(250,204,21,.22)','rgba(251,113,133,.20)'][i]);rg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');ctx.fillStyle=rg;ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h)}ctx.restore();ctx.save();ctx.globalAlpha=.1;ctx.strokeStyle='#fff';for(let y=90;y<h;y+=58){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y+Math.sin(t+y)*8);ctx.bezierCurveTo(w*.26,y-42,w*.62,y+42,w,y-10);ctx.stroke()}ctx.restore();ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.1)';rr(ctx,110,h-70,w-220,12,6);ctx.fill();g=ctx.createLinearGradient(110,0,w-110,0);g.addColorStop(0,'#7dd3fc');g.addColorStop(.35,'#7bd88f');g.addColorStop(.7,'#facc15');g.addColorStop(1,'#fb7185');ctx.fillStyle=g;rr(ctx,110,h-70,(w-220)*Math.min(1,t/10),12,6);ctx.fill();ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.66)';ctx.font='800 19px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('library-timeline: every dependency has a visible timed beat',110,h-98)}}}

function createRenderer(){function cl(v){return Math.max(0,Math.min(1,v))}return{render(time,context){const ctx=context.mainContext,w=context.width,h=context.height;const gs=(context.libs&&context.libs.gsap)||globalThis.gsap;const split=(context.libs&&context.libs.SplitType)||globalThis.SplitType;const ease=gs&&gs.parseEase?gs.parseEase('expo.out'):function(v){v=cl(v);return 1-Math.pow(1-v,4)};ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='900 42px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('01  GSAP + SplitType',110,112);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(189,239,255,.7)';ctx.font='700 22px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('staggered kinetic type, library-aware timing',112,148);const text='LIBRARY TIMELINE';ctx.textAlign='center';const start=w/2-(text.length-1)*46;for(let i=0;i<text.length;i++){const ch=text[i],p=ease(cl((time-i*.035)/.9));ctx.save();ctx.translate(start+i*92,h/2+(1-p)*150+Math.sin(time*2+i)*8);ctx.rotate((1-p)*-.65);ctx.globalAlpha=p;ctx.shadowColor=i%2?'#7bd88f':'#7dd3fc';ctx.shadowBlur=24*p;ctx.fillStyle=i%2?'#7bd88f':'#ffffff';ctx.font='900 82px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText(ch,0,0);ctx.restore()}ctx.textAlign='left';ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.58)';ctx.font='700 20px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('SplitType loaded: '+(split?'yes':'fallback')+'  |  GSAP ease: '+(gs?'active':'fallback'),112,h-166)}}}

function createRenderer(){function cl(v){return Math.max(0,Math.min(1,v))}function out(v){v=cl(v);return 1-Math.pow(1-v,3)}function rr(ctx,x,y,w,h,r){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x+r,y);ctx.lineTo(x+w-r,y);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y,x+w,y+r);ctx.lineTo(x+w,y+h-r);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y+h,x+w-r,y+h);ctx.lineTo(x+r,y+h);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y+h,x,y+h-r);ctx.lineTo(x,y+r);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y,x+r,y);ctx.closePath()}return{render(time,context){const p=out(time/2.5),vals=[.31,.74,.52,.91,.69,.86,.44,.96,.78];const mean=math&&math.mean?math.mean(vals):vals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/vals.length;const g=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,y,0,560);g.addColorStop(0,i%3===0?'#7dd3fc':i%3===1?'#7bd88f':'#facc15');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(255,255,255,.09)');ctx.fillStyle=g;rr(ctx,x,y,70,bh,16);ctx.fill()}ctx.lineWidth=7;ctx.strokeStyle='#ffffff';ctx.shadowColor='#7dd3fc';ctx.shadowBlur=20;ctx.beginPath();for(let 25px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('math.mean(data)',w-610,176);ctx.restore()}}}

function createRenderer(){return{render(time,context){const ctx=context.mainContext,w=context.width,h=context.height;const THREE=(context.libs&&context.libs.THREE)||globalThis.THREE;const PP=(context.libs&&context.libs.POSTPROCESSING)||globalThis.POSTPROCESSING;ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='900 42px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('03  THREE + POSTPROCESSING',110,112);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(189,239,255,.7)';ctx.font='700 22px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('real vector math, depth projection, and effect pipeline presence',112,148);const pts=[];for(let x=-1;x<=1;x+=2)for(let y=-1;y<=1;y+=2)for(let z=-1;z<=1;z+=2){let v=THREE&&THREE.Vector3?new THREE.Vector3(x,y,z):{x:x,y:y,z:z};if(v.applyAxisAngle&&THREE){v.applyAxisAngle(new THREE.Vector3(0,1,0),time*1.25);v.applyAxisAngle(new THREE.Vector3(1,0,0),time*.85)}const s=315/(2.7+v.z);pts.push({x:w/2+v.x*s*2.25,y:h/2+v.y*s*2.25,z:v.z})}const edges=[[0,1],[0,2],[0,4],[3,1],[3,2],[3,7],[5,1],[5,4],[5,7],[6,2],[6,4],[6,7]];ctx.save();ctx.shadowColor='#7dd3fc';ctx.shadowBlur=36;ctx.lineWidth=11;edges.forEach((e,i)=>{ctx.strokeStyle=i%2?'#facc15':'#7dd3fc';ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(pts[e[0]].x,pts[e[0]].y);ctx.lineTo(pts[e[1]].x,pts[e[1]].y);ctx.stroke()});ctx.restore();for(let i=0;i<22;i++){ctx.strokeStyle=i%2?'rgba(123,216,143,.35)':'rgba(125,211,252,.28)';ctx.beginPath();ctx.ellipse(w/2,h/2+230,230+i*28,42+i*5,time*.25+i*.12,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.stroke()}ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.58)';ctx.font='700 20px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('POSTPROCESSING keys: '+(PP?Object.keys(PP).slice(0,7).join(', '):'fallback'),112,h-166)}}}

function createRenderer(){let noise;function
